reference: NO RESISTANCE WAS POSSIBLE ON THE PART OF MENAHEM THE USURPER WHO WAS PROBABLY READY TO WELCOME THE ASSYRIAN CONQUEROR SO THAT BY ARRANGING AN ALLIANCE HE MIGHT SECURE HIS OWN POSITION
text: no resistance was possible on the part of menihem the usurper who was probably ready to welcome the assyrian conqueror so that by arranging an alliance he might secure his own position
